name: @elizaos/plugin-spraay-wallet
description: 💧 Spraay Agent Wallet plugin for ElizaOS — provision smart wallets, manage session keys, and predict wallet addresses via x402 micropayments on Base

EVM_PRIVATE_KEY.description: EVM private key for signing x402 USDC micropayments on Base. The wallet must hold USDC on Base (0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913). Each action call costs $0.001-$0.05 in USDC depending on the endpoint.

SPRAAY_GATEWAY_URL.description: Spraay gateway URL (default: https://gateway.spraay.app). No API key needed — authentication and payment are handled via x402 USDC micropayments per request.

paymentModel.note: Each plugin action triggers a USDC micropayment on Base via the x402 protocol. Ensure the configured wallet has sufficient USDC balance before use.

author: plagtech
